text:
Submitter-Id:   mohacsi@ik.bme.hu
 Originator:     Janos Mohacsi
 Organization:   Technical University of Budapest, Centre of IT
 Confidential:   no 
 Synopsis:       /usr/ports/imap-uw/files/imap-uw.conf is missing.
 Severity:       non-critical
 Priority:       low 
 Category:       ports 
 Release:        FreeBSD 4.2-STABLE i386
 Class:          sw-bug 
 Environment: 
 
 	FreeBSD 4.2 stable port collection from cvsup (09.04.2001)
 
 Description: 
 
 	Issuing the command "make cert" in the port mail/imap-uw the
 openssl misses /usr/ports/imap-uw/files/imap-uw.conf.
 	
 
 How-To-Repeat: 
 	Try to compile imap-uw with SSL and install cert.
 
 	
 
 Fix:
